item.title:
clubber: Clubber @clubber · 8min GOAL @wicklowgaa
Pádraig Doyle makes use of the high ball into the square and fires his side
item.description:
Clubber @clubber · 8min GOAL @wicklowgaa
Pádraig Doyle makes use of the high ball into the square and fires his side into a 3-Point lead
Watch it live NOW on http:// Clubber.ie 169
